title: Remote control
description: Let a phone/web client remotely take over this machine's session (tools still run locally). Once enabled, local conversations are mirrored to the phone, and the phone can drive the same session.
tokenHint: The shared NATS access token for the deployed relay (simple pairing, Phase 1).
pairIdHint: Optional subject namespace override. Leave empty to reuse the existing pairing or generate a random ID.
pairingCodeLabel: Pairing code (paste into the web client)
pairingCodeHint: Hand this code to the web/phone client and paste it there. Valid for 10 minutes. It carries the NATS address, pairId and access token — treat it like a password.
copyFailed: Copy failed — copy the code manually.
note: Note: remote control requires the desktop (GUI + agent) to be online and awake — this is an inherent prerequisite, not a cloud failure. Simple pairing (Phase 1) gives admission control + a random-pairId partition, NOT server-enforced per-subject isolation (that needs Phase 2 JWTs).
